# real_day fixtures

Six consecutive real API snapshots per endpoint (2024-01-12, slots 06:01Z–08:31Z), taken
verbatim from the scraped backlog and truncated to the first 8 windows of each response
(compact JSON, all 18 regions and 9 fuels retained). They carry genuine between-snapshot
change patterns, which the change-log/reconstruction property tests rely on — do not
hand-edit values.
